summary: NIRO New Entry Flow - Public Landing Page Testing Complete. All features verified: landing page as entry point, hero section, testimonials marquee, life topics (4 cards), how it works, experts section, footer with social icons, navigation, mobile hamburger menu, sticky nav with backdrop blur, and CTA intent storage in localStorage.

public_landing_page_entry_point.verification: App starts with PublicLandingPage component, not login screen

hero_section.verification: Hero title 'Expert astrology guidance' visible, teal gradient background, trust badges (4.5+ rated, Unlimited chat, Remedies support)

hero_cta_button.verification: 'Get Your Free 10-Min Call' button (data-testid=hero-free-call-btn) stores intent {type: 'free_call'} in localStorage and redirects to login

nav_bar_elements.verification: Logo, About, Life Topics, Our Experts, How It Works nav links present

nav_cta_button.verification: 'Get a free 10 mins consultation' button (data-testid=nav-free-call-btn) stores intent and redirects to login

testimonials_marquee.verification: 'Customer Feedback' section with marquee animation (animate-marquee class), 6 testimonial cards visible

what_we_offer_section.verification: 'What We Offer' section with 5 feature cards (Curated Astrologers, Situation-Based Packages, Unlimited Chat, No Fear, Remedies Support)

life_topics_4_cards.verification: 4 topic cards present: Career, Health, Love, Fertility - each with 'Begin consultation' button

how_it_works_section.verification: 4 steps: Choose & Book, Your Session, Stay Supported, Remedies Execution

our_experts_section.verification: 4 expert cards (Prakash Jha, Sanjai Maharaj, Pooja Kapoor, Vikram Rao) with 'Niro Certified' badges

footer_social_icons.verification: 4 social media icons (Instagram, X, LinkedIn, YouTube) present in footer

footer_links.verification: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Contact Us links present

mobile_hamburger_menu.verification: Hamburger menu visible on mobile (390px), opens with About, Life Topics, Our Experts, How It Works, and CTA

desktop_nav_hidden_mobile.verification: Desktop nav links hidden on mobile viewport (md:hidden class)

sticky_nav_backdrop_blur.verification: Nav position: fixed, top: 0px, backdropFilter: blur(20px)

nav_scroll_to_sections.verification: About, Life Topics, Our Experts, How It Works nav links scroll to respective sections (id=about, topics, experts, how)

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for post-login flows. Landing page and intent storage tested without authentication.

context_for_next_testing_agent: New entry flow implemented: PublicLandingPage is now the default entry point (not login). CTAs store intent in localStorage (key: niro_user_intent). Intent types: {type: 'free_call'} for free call CTA, {type: 'consultation', topicId: 'career|health|love|fertility'} for topic consultation buttons. After login, SimplifiedApp routes based on intent. Intent helpers exported from PublicLandingPage: setUserIntent, getUserIntent, clearUserIntent. All data-testid attributes are in place for CTA buttons.
